caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey and white baseball cap, and large black over-ear headphones is recording in a studio. He is positioned behind a professional condenser microphone held by a black shock mount and boom arm, which has the text "Mackie SR-32" printed on it. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels arranged in a geometric pattern. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking into the microphone. He begins with his arms slightly extended, then brings his left hand closer to his chest. By the end of the clip, he makes a wide, sweeping gesture with his right hand, moving it rapidly across the frame in a blurring motion. He remains centered in the shot, facing slightly to the right, as he continues his delivery.
